column5: Provided citation, DOI or open access to published protocol
column6: Provided Boolean-style full search string and state the platform for which the string is formatted (e.g., Web of Science format)
column7: The authors indicated whether they considered non-English studies during the screening process
column8: Described the process by which the comprehensiveness of the search strategy was assessed (i.e., list of benchmark articles)
column9: Described the methodology for screening articles/studies for relevance. Methods for consistency of screening decisions (at title, abstract, and full texts levels) checking must be described.
column10: Provided the number of articles retained following full text screening
column11: Provided a file and/or table containing raw extracted quantitative or qualitative data (study findings) from included studies
column12: Provided metadata (i.e. detailed description of extracted raw variables) in a separate table, list and/or file for included studies
column13: Described any financial or non-financial competing interests that the review authors may have or provided a statement of the absence of any potential competing interests
column15: The authors reported which languages were included in the literature search
column16: If the authors explicitly stated that they intended to include any studies in languages other than English in their final dataset, select “Yes”.
column17: The authors reported using non-English search terms or provided search strings formatted for non-English databases as part of their search strategy.
column18: The authors described the data extraction process (who extracted, double-checking, and consistency)
column19: The authors reported and visualised the review flow and the number of studies retained at each stage (e.g., in a PRISMA/ROSES diagram).
column20: The authors provided bibliographic information (for example, author, year, title, DOI) for all studies included in the synthesis.
column21: The authors provided bibliographic information for studies excluded at the full-text screening stage, including reasons for exclusion.
column22: The authors provided analysis and/or figure-generation computer code/scripts.
